description: Operate AFFiNE GraphQL from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Canvas layout planner
novel_features.description: Builds a deterministic AFFiNE canvas card layout from a compact JSON tree spec.

novel_features.name: Canvas search selector
novel_features.description: Finds AFFiNE canvas blocks, cards, and connectors by stable selector fields.

novel_features.name: Canvas diff diagnosis
novel_features.description: Compares two AFFiNE canvas states and reports semantic entity changes.

novel_features.name: Canvas transform planner
novel_features.description: Builds dry-run operation plans for selected AFFiNE canvas entities.

novel_features.name: Canvas model normalizer
novel_features.description: Normalizes AFFiNE canvas JSON into explicit nodes and connectors.

novel_features.name: Canvas plan validator
novel_features.description: Checks planned canvas nodes and connectors for invalid geometry and orphaned links.

novel_features.name: Canvas gated apply
novel_features.description: Dry-runs canvas plans and applies transform or layout plans only behind explicit live gates.

novel_features.name: Canvas card image patch
novel_features.description: Patches an existing AFFiNE canvas card image/logo while preserving card identity and text.

novel_features.name: Canvas document integrity check
novel_features.description: Checks AFFiNE canvas document snapshots for structural issues such as missing children maps.

novel_features.name: Canvas document repair
novel_features.description: Repairs a narrow set of AFFiNE canvas integrity issues with dry-run and backup controls.
